rationale: Domestic business corporation legal name as on SOS record.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...the effective date of the domestication is (date)
rationale: Effective date of the corporation's conversion to a foreign entity. Must coordinate with the foreign-jurisdiction filing's effective date.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The corporation's new jurisdiction of incorporation is
rationale: State or country into which the corporation is being domesticated. Same value family as entity.home_jurisdiction (used by foreign-qualification filings) — but here it is the destination of an outbound domestication, not the origin.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ...mailing address to which the Secretary of State may mail a copy of any process served on the Secretary of State. (mailing address)
rationale: Single-line mailing address for SOS forwarding of process related to appraisal-rights enforcement (13-C chapter 13). Distinct from registered_agent.mailing_address (the corporation no longer has an agent in Maine after surrender) and entity.principal_office.mailing_address.
Date the articles of surrender are signed.

rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget. Shape D (matching MBCA-11, MBCA-12, MLLC-12). The *By line above it is the signature line and is not an AcroForm widget on this form (template gap — note in open_questions).
